g.text: What We Are Trying to Achieve — Goals & Outcomes
Goals
Outcomes
Achieve Unity of Effort Across Autonomous, Agentic SDLC Work
Speed Up Architectural Planning & Governance for Agentic Work
Plan Collaboratively in a Unified, Staged Repository System
Provide Independent Read-Access to Architecture for Teams & Agents
Enable Fast Feedback from Implementation to Architecture
Maintain Coherence and Traceability
Enable Cross-Engagement Architectural Reuse
Reduced Planning & Governance Overhead
AI Agents Efficiently Discover & Edit Architecture Artifacts
Stakeholder Concerns and Hand-Off Points Explicitly Verifiable
Architectural Guidance Available Without Specialist Dependency
AI Agents Produce Fewer Architecture-Drift Corrections
Changes Validated Against Architecture Before Implementation
Implementation Changes Fed Back, Reviewed & Promoted
Requirements Traceable to Realized Components
Architecture Governance Scales Without Proportional Overhead
Increased Architectural Coherence
Proven Patterns Promoted and Adopted Across Engagements
Engagements Plan Concurrently Against a Shared, Staged Baseline
